content: Game feel essentials: coyote time (allow jump a few frames after leaving ledge), jump buffering (register jump pressed slightly before landing), variable jump height (cut upward velocity when jump released). Mario-feel uses asymmetric gravity (lower gravity rising, higher falling) not pure parabola. Tuning: lower gravity = floaty, higher = heavy; jump impulse mid-range. ALL movement must scale by dt() to be frame-rate independent, else physics differ on 60 vs 144Hz monitors.
